india_trends.title: Vodafone Idea gets promoter support but funding challenge persists
india_trends.summary: Vodafone Idea posted early signs of recovery with stabilising subscribers and higher Arpu, backed by a ₹4,730-crore promoter infusion. However, analysts say large spectrum dues, funding gaps and network expansion needs remain major challenges.

india_trends.title: Reliance Jio IPO: How much-awaited IPO likely to impact Reliance share price?
india_trends.summary: Reliance Jio is reworking its much-awaited IPO into a fully fresh issue of shares, dropping the earlier plan where global investors would have partially sold their stakes.

india_trends.title: What does an import restriction mean for silver investments?
india_trends.summary: India’s move to restrict silver imports and raise duties is expected to push up domestic prices by increasing premiums over global benchmarks. india_trends.title: PFC board clears next step for REC merger, seeks govt approval
india_trends.summary: Power Finance Corporation has taken a key step toward merging with REC Limited after its board approved seeking the President of India’s nod for the transaction. india_trends.title: Realty group Sattva deepens premium hotel push amid travel boom
india_trends.summary: Sattva’s expansion comes amid a broader shift among Indian real estate developers towards hospitality assets as room rates and occupancies remain high after the pandemic-led travel rebound.

india_trends.title: India becomes largest market for KitKat globally for Nestle
india_trends.summary: India is now the world's biggest market for KitKat. This iconic chocolate wafer bar has seen accelerated growth.
